calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-14-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Elan Wick, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not Reported. (611)

APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff/Respondent Robert A. Jung is present In Propria Persona.
Plaintiff's witness Officer Charles Chan (SFPD) is present.
Defendant/Appellant Wenying Chen is present.
Brian T. Murphy, Esq. appearing on behalf of the defendant/appellant.

This matter comes on calendar for a trial de novo. The litigants are sworn and give testimony on their own behalf. The court also questions the litigants regarding their testimony. Plaintiff's witness Charles Chan is sworn and examined by both sides.

The following Plaintiff's exhibits are marked during the proceedings;
1 - Traffic Collision Report #070 719 899, dated 7/17/07
2 - Supplemental Incident Report, dated 7/26/07
3 - "Chronology of Events"
4 - "March 21, 2008"
5 - UCSF Screening & Acute Care Clinic Report for R. Jung, dated 7/17/07
6 - UCSF Ambulatory Services Radiology & EKG Results Mailer, dated 9/14/07
7 - SFFD Ambulance Billing
8 - Photos, 12 total

The following Defense exhibits are marked during the proceedings;
9 - Letter from R. Jung to SFPD Chief Heather Fong, CHP Commissioner Mike Brown, DMV Investigator Andy Au-Yeng, and CDI Insurance Commissioner Steve Poizner, dated 10/20/07
10 - 2 color photos of silver car, passenger side
11 - 2 color photos of Irving Street
12 - Sketch of accident
13 - Small Claims Brief

Upon hearing all argument and receiving all evidence, the court takes this matter under submission.

5/14/08 - JUDGMENT ENTERED IN FAVOR OF THE DEFENDANT/APPELLANT.
